name: DOGE Value Recovery Scale-In v1
thesis: In DOGE 4h chop conditions, deeper pullbacks that recover value can produce denser continuation entries when confirmation improves across bars. The edge should come from broad value repair with staged participation, not single-bar hero timing.
edge_mechanism: value recovery continuation with improving confirmation
invalidation_condition: Abort if walk-forward testing shows zero trades on valid data, contradictory filter behavior, weak blind-window participation, or no post-cost edge.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Value recovery after a deeper reset where the market reclaims structure and can continue before fading again.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: In chop, deeper pullbacks often shake out weak positioning; if value is reclaimed quickly, a second-leg continuation can emerge with good reward/risk.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: DOGE 4h is volatile enough for repeated value-dislocation events while still offering enough bars for staged participation.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If DOGE remains pure balance without continuation follow-through, value recovery may become only a bounce and not a continuation setup.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If there is some participation but trade count is low, widen reclaim distance before changing management.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; reclaim, structure, and directional filters point in the same direction
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: reduced by broad pullback threshold and simple qualifier stack
